query: Magnificent 7 tech companies (Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, Tesla) large acquisitions $10 billion or more announced or rumored in 2026, especially mid-2026. Any pending big M&A deals as of June-July 2026?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary of findings on Magnificent 7 large acquisitions ($10B+) in 2026, focused on mid-2026:

## Key Findings

**Confirmed pending $10B+ Mag 7 deal (June–July 2026):**
- **Amazon–Globalstar (~$11.6B)** — announced April 14, 2026; **still pending** with FCC review opened June 8, 2026 and a comment deadline of July 6, 2026. Boosts Amazon's Leo/Project Kuiper satellite internet vs. Starlink. This is the single genuine pending $10B+ Mag 7 acquisition as of mid-2026.

**Recently completed / closing $10B+ deals:**
- **Alphabet–Wiz (~$32B)** — closed March 11, 2026; largest acquisition in Alphabet's history (cloud cybersecurity).
- **Nvidia–Groq assets (~$20B)** — announced Dec 24, 2025; Nvidia's largest deal on record, drew a Senate antitrust inquiry.

**Speculative / rumored $10B+ (unconfirmed):**
- **Apple AI mega-deal** — persistent rumors (Perplexity ~$14B, reportedly dead; or Mistral), but no confirmed $10B+ deal. Apple's biggest 2026 deal was Q.ai (~$2B).
- **Tesla–SpaceX merger** — CNBC reported talks May 27, 2026; RBC raised its price target to $500 on July 9, 2026 pricing in a possible combination. Related-party and speculative.

**No $10B+ acquisitions:** Meta (largest was the $14.3B Scale AI *stake* in June 2025; 2026 deals were smaller tuck-ins like Manus ~$2B), Microsoft (only small tuck-ins), and Tesla (only a ~$2B AI-hardware purchase).

The full synthesis, sources, and structured data points have been delivered via the StructuredOutput tool.

Technology: US Deals 2026 midyear outlook: PwC

key_facts: Alphabet closed its ~$32B all-cash acquisition of cybersecurity firm Wiz on March 11, 2026 — the largest acquisition in Alphabet's history (DOJ cleared; EU unconditional approval Feb 2026).

Amazon announced a ~$11.57B acquisition of satellite firm Globalstar on April 14, 2026 ($90/share) to boost its Leo/Project Kuiper satellite internet; the deal is PENDING with FCC review opened June 8, 2026 and comments due July 6, 2026.
Nvidia announced a ~$20B cash acquisition of Groq's assets on December 24, 2025 — its largest deal on record — which drew a Senate antitrust inquiry (Warren/Blumenthal, March 20, 2026).

Meta made no confirmed $10B+ acquisition in 2026; its landmark AI deal was a $14.3B investment for a 49% non-voting stake in Scale AI (June 2025). 2026 deals were smaller (Manus ~$2B+; Assured Robot Intelligence, undisclosed).

Apple made no $10B+ acquisition; its largest 2026 deal was Q.ai (~$2B, Jan 2026), its second-biggest ever after Beats. A rumored large AI mega-deal (Perplexity ~$14B, reportedly dead; or Mistral) remains speculative as of July 2026.
Microsoft announced no new $10B+ acquisition in 2026 — only small tuck-ins (e.g., Osmos).

Tesla made no $10B+ acquisition (disclosed a ~$2B AI-hardware firm purchase); the key mid-2026 story is unconfirmed Tesla–SpaceX merger speculation (CNBC reported talks May 27, 2026; RBC raised price target to $500 on July 9, 2026 pricing in a possible combination).
2026 is described as a record year for AI-driven M&A; PwC's midyear outlook notes a 'barbell' of transformational megadeals plus small AI tuck-ins.
Non-Mag-7 megadeals shaping the 2026 environment include Netflix–Warner Bros. Discovery (~$83B pending), PIF/Silver Lake–EA (~$55B), and SpaceX–Anysphere/Cursor ($60B all-stock, announced June 2026).
